editorial_policy: Article bodies are manually authored in skcKenneth.github.io and are never generated or overwritten by sync.

assets.alt: Two academic line-and-interval charts comparing person-weighted classroom CO2 exposure and fan-energy proxy across nominal, room-change, capacity-derating, and combined-stress conditions.
assets.caption: Four controllers are evaluated on 120 matched synthetic days per condition; error bars are bootstrap 95% intervals.

assets.alt: A three-classroom shared-fan schematic beside CO2 and occupancy traces for a representative combined-stress school day.
assets.caption: The shared command budget couples three well-mixed classroom mass balances under time-varying occupancy.

assets.alt: Five-stage methodology diagram from timetable and measured state through short forecasting, constrained airflow allocation, and room-change plus capacity stress testing.
assets.caption: The evidence pipeline separates occupancy information, controller state, predictive allocation, and stress evaluation.

assets.alt: A combined-stress exposure-energy trade-off chart and a sensitivity plot showing exposure and fan energy as the occupancy forecast buffer increases.
assets.caption: The uncertainty buffer produces a modest exposure reduction while increasing the fan-energy proxy.

assets.alt: Two IEEE-oriented line-and-interval charts comparing timely thermal-fault detection and median warning lead time across nominal, sensor-drift, sensor-dropout, and combined conditions.
assets.caption: Four detectors are evaluated on matched synthetic trajectories; proportion intervals are Wilson 95% intervals and lead-time intervals are bootstrap 95% intervals.

assets.alt: A labelled 4 by 4 battery thermal network beside a representative fault trajectory with fault onset, graph-CUSUM alarm, and 60 degree simulation boundary.
assets.caption: The benchmark represents cells as a coupled thermal graph and evaluates whether an alarm arrives before the study boundary.

assets.alt: Five-stage academic methodology diagram from coupled thermal simulation through residual construction, graph evidence pooling, sequential testing, and drift-dropout stress evaluation.
assets.caption: Only the graph-evidence and calibrated sequential-test stages are proposed; calibration and evaluation use disjoint seed ranges.

assets.alt: An interval plot of false-alarm rate against positive sensor drift and a hatched ablation chart under combined drift and sensor dropout.
assets.caption: The robustness sweep and ablation expose the method's detection-versus-false-alarm trade-off instead of reporting accuracy alone.

assets.alt: Two IEEE-style line charts comparing leak-localisation accuracy across pressure noise and sensor dropout for four placement methods.
assets.caption: The proposed dropout-aware placement is compared with random, degree-centrality, and nominal greedy layouts; error bars show Wilson 95% intervals.

assets.alt: Five-stage IEEE-style methodology diagram from synthetic network construction through leak signatures, dropout-aware sensor placement, localisation, and stress evaluation.
assets.caption: The reproducible evidence pipeline separates the proposed placement step from signature generation, localisation, and Monte Carlo evaluation.

assets.alt: Side-by-side water-network diagrams comparing nominal greedy and dropout-aware pressure sensor locations.
assets.caption: Nominal and dropout-aware sensor layouts on the 36-node synthetic network. The proposed objective spreads measurements across diagnostically distinct regions after sensor loss.

assets.alt: Bar charts of dropout-aware signature separation and top-one and top-three leak-localisation accuracy under the designated stress test.
assets.caption: Ablation and stress test at 8% relative pressure noise and 40% probability of one sensor dropout.

assets.alt: Multilayer Gongbei transport network connecting pedestrian, bus, rail, and taxi nodes
assets.caption: Multilayer network used in the accessible-routing study.

assets.alt: Profit, energy, and fairness trade-off frontier for the EV dispatch experiment
assets.caption: Non-degenerate scheduling frontier from the reported EV dispatch run.

assets.alt: Space-time heat map of speed in a synthetic microscopic traffic simulation
assets.caption: Synthetic traffic-wave heat map.

assets.alt: Matrix of simulated dengue incidence across synthetic climate and allocation scenarios
assets.caption: Synthetic incidence comparison generated by the experiment matrix.

assets.alt: Modeled coastal defence cost and risk optimization frontier
assets.caption: Optimization frontier for the stylized coastal-defence teaching case.

assets.alt: Comparison of pollinator population and yield across configured management scenarios
assets.caption: Scenario comparison from the synthetic agent-based ecosystem model.
